backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an esports backend with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both collections. Announcements are sorted by timestamp descending.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that a new gaming artwork image should be saved as the profile avatar static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png, with no code changes required since it is already referenced by Navbar and AboutSection.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's component and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that sets up OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Legend X Esports', mounting the app at #root and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the fixed Navbar alongside the LandingPage within a dark-themed full-height container.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel using the gaming artwork, and a four-card values grid covering Discipline, Excellence, Victory, and Brotherhood.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Card component for a single announcement that formats a nanosecond ICP timestamp, displays title and body excerpt, and reveals a 'Read More' indicator on hover.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, social media icon links (X, Discord, Twitch, YouTube, Instagram), quick navigation links, contact info, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a cover background image, layered dark and red gradient overlays, large display title, tagline, CTA buttons, and a three-stat counter row.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive fixed navbar with scroll-aware background, desktop nav links, and a toggleable mobile menu for the Legend X Esports site.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: News section that fetches announcements via `useAnnouncements` and renders them in a grid with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Display card for a single roster member showing their avatar, name, and role with hover effects and a fallback default avatar.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Roster section that fetches team members via `useRoster` and renders them as a responsive grid of `PlayerCard` components with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via `@dfinity/auth-client`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for reading and mutating announcements and roster members by calling the ICP backend actor obtained from `useActor`.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for the dark esports color theme, and provides utility/component classes for glows, typography, card hover effects, and diagonal clip paths.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Top-level landing page component that composes the full single-page layout by rendering HeroSection, AboutSection, RosterSection, NewsSection, and Footer in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with esports-specific color tokens (red, gold, dark shades), custom fonts (Bebas Neue, Rajdhani, Inter), glow box shadows, and animation keyframes, while enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 15) that records the app summary, implemented features with requirement IDs, image processing requirements, and metadata for the Legend X Esports ICP esports landing page project.
